commands.review_summary:
The PR makes embedded-agent orphan prompt repair drop provenance-classified internal inter-session user leaves when a fresh prompt exists, preserves `sessions_send` leaves, updates the repair log wording, and adds focused tests.

PR surface: Source +22, Tests +70. Total +92 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main prepends any non-duplicate orphan user leaf before the fresh prompt, and the linked canonical issue supplies logs from that repair path. I did not run a live current-main channel reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-provided real runtime proof and maintainer review of the session-state semantics, not an automated code repair.
